use_cases: Creating interactive card sections where text is revealed as users move their cursor
Building engaging landing page sections with hover-activated content reveals
Designing portfolio or demo showcases with dynamic text effects
Adding interactive product feature cards that reveal details on interaction
Creating animated about or team sections with reveal-on-hover functionality
ai_summary: Interactive dark-themed card component with text reveal effect triggered by mouse movement. Uses motion animations and clip-path to progressively reveal hidden text as the cursor moves across the card surface. Features a subtle glass-like border treatment on a dark background (#1d1d20) with smooth opacity transitions. Perfect for creating engaging interactive sections in landing pages, demos, or portfolio displays.
